sqlCommands.descr: Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr and (t.BusCat = m.Field1 or m.Field1 = '') and (t.TTY = m.Field2 or m.Field2 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL and not GL in ('2853500','2851017') and not TTY = '815'

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.Descr and (t.BusCat = m.Field1 or m.Field1 = '') and (t.TTY = m.Field2 or m.Field2 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL and not TTY = '815'
update TransX set TTY = '900' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and GL in ('1570000','2170000','2851017') and not TTY = '815'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Assgnmt, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1099917' as GL, substring(GL,1,3) + '% 804' as Assgnmt, Crcy, '' as TTY, TP, '' as BusCat, PC, Flex5, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,3) in ('161','162','241','242','441','682') or TTY = '804') and not GL in ('1610002','2421002') and not TTY = '815' group by KeyID,Co,Crcy,TP,PC,Flex5,substring(GL,1,3))
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2) (Select '[batchID]',ReinLoc,Descr from ReinLocs)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Assgnmt, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, m.Field3 as GL, x.GL + ' ' + TTY as Assgnmt, Crcy, m.Field5 as TTY, TP, m.Field4 as BusCat, PC, Flex5, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID like 'Rev Offset%' and m.Descr = 'any' and m.Field1 = 'any' and m.Field2 = x.TTY and m.Field6 = '1' where KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data8'))

Update x set PC = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + (case when x.BusCat = '20' then 'A' else 'C' end) + 'N' + (case when x.TP like 'F%' then 'A' else 'T' end) + 'P0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.Flex5 and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data8')

Update t set Amt2 = round(Amt2*r1.Rate/r2.Rate,2) from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.Field3 = 'convert' and m.ID = 'Co' and m.Descr = t.Co inner join CrcyRates r1 on r1.Crcy = m.Field2 and r1.Typ = 'S' and r1.EffDate = (select max(EffDate) from (select EffDate from CrcyRates where Typ = 'S' and Crcy = 'GBP' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]') a) inner join CrcyRates r2 on r2.Crcy = m.Field4 and r2.Typ = 'S' and r2.EffDate = r1.EffDate where t.KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data8')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Zone) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Flex5, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3,Zone from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC,ProdCode,PTF,Assgnmt,Flex5,Zone)

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr and t.BusCat = m.Field1 and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL in ('2853500','2851017')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2'  and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and (GL = '1099917' or GL > '3000000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt,Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt,Flex5,Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

Update x set Amt1 = round(Amt1*c.Rate,2), Crcy = 'USD' From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Exp' and y.Descr = x.Crcy inner join CrcyRates c on c.Crcy = x.Crcy and c.Typ = 'S' and c.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]' where x.KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data8')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (not PK in ('40','50') or PK is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID, '9999' as Co, 'filler' as GL, '' as Crcy, '' as PC, '' as TTY, '' as TP, '' as  Assgnmt, '' as ProdCode, '' as PTF, 0 as Amt1, 0 as  Amt2 , 0 as  Amt3)
update TransX set TTY = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('2853500','3870003') and not '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31'
update TransX set ProdCode = 'U1892', PTF = 'U3650' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4600000' and coalesce(ProdCode,'') = ''

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Assgnmt, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '401' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, Assgnmt, Crcy, '' as TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone = '7' and GL like '131%' and TTY = '809')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '3870003' as GL, Crcy, '640' as TTY, TP, PC, '' as ProdCode, '' as PTF, '' as Assgnmt, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy, TP, PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, TTY, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, TTY, TP, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, TTY, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, TTY, TP, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1')
Update TransX set Amt1 = coalesce(Amt4,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt5,0), Amt3 =coalesce(Amt6,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and not Co like '599%'
update TransX set Amt1 = coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt2,0), Amt3 = coalesce(Amt3,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and ('[yyyy-mm-dd]' <> '2022-01-31'  or Co like '599%')
Update x set x.Flex5 = y.Product from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set  BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Assgnmt is NULL
Update TransX set PC = '5500000000' where KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data8') and Flex5 = 'Investment'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and GL > '3000000' and not Co like '599%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-03-31' and Co like '599%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL = '4099998' and BusCat like '3%'  and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[version]' = 'First' and Co like '599%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Zone = '6' and GL in ('1399997','2399997','4099998')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Assgnmt, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Assgnmt, Crcy, '806' as TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone = '7' and GL like '231%' and TTY = '809')
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Co like '599%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1560001' as GL, Crcy, PC,'627' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1801' as ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600067')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Assgnmt, Crcy, TTY, ProdCode, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, '2880000 803' as Assgnmt, Crcy, '822' as TTY, 'U1801' as ProdCode, TP, '' as BusCat, PC, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2880000')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Name from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = p.Name from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set BusCatDesc = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.BusCat = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat <> '' and Table_ID = 'BusCat'
update TransX set Flex1 = c.SAPname from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.TTY = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.TTY <> '' and m.Table_ID = 'TTY'
update TransX set Flex3 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL >= m.Field1 and t.GL <= m.Field2 where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and m.Table_ID = 'AffBalRollFwd' and m.ID = 'GL'
update TransX set Flex4 = case when TTY = 100 then 'BBal' else 'YTD' end from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex5 = case when BusCat >= 10 and BusCat <= 29 then 'Assumed' else 'Ceded' end from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex6 = case when TTY >= 990 then 'yes' else 'no' end from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Assgnmt, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Assgnmt, Crcy, '801' as TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone = '7' and GL like '131%' and TTY = '809')
update TransX set  BusCat = '20' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = ''
update TransX set  TTY = '100' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not TTY = '' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31'
update TransX set  TTY = '612' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TTY = '809' and (GL like '155%1' or GL like '215%1')
update TransX set  TTY = '607' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TTY = '809' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('155','215')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Assgnmt, Crcy, TTY, ProdCode, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, '2880000 803' as Assgnmt, Crcy, '824' as TTY, 'U1801' as ProdCode, TP, '' as BusCat, PC, Flex5, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2880000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, m.Field3 as GL, Crcy, m.Field5 as TTY, x.GL + ' ' + TTY as Assgnmt, TP, m.Field4 as BusCat, PC, Flex5, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID like 'Rev Offset%' and m.Descr = x.GL and m.Field1 = (case when substring(x.GL,1,3) in ('132','148','231','232') then '' else x.BusCat end) and m.Field2 = (case when substring(x.GL,6,1) = '9' and substring(x.TTY,1,1) = '9' then '' else x.TTY end) and m.Field6 = '1' and not x.TTY = '815' where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'607' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1804' as ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'602' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1804' as ProdCode, Flex5, -Amt1, -Amt2 , -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600000')
update TransX set  TTY = '607' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and not '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and TTY = '' and GL in ('2150000')
update TransX set  TTY = '612' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TTY = '607' and GL in ('2150001')
Update TransX set ProdCode =  'U1806' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co like '599%' and GL = '1560000'
update TransX set PTF = 'U3010' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '56%'
update t set TPname = tp.Name,Flex5 = tp.OneStreamID from TransX t inner join TPs tp on t.TP = tp.TP where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
Update TransX set TTY = '900' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1099917' and not TTY = '815'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1099917' as GL, Crcy, '900' as TTY, TP, PC, '' as ProdCode, '' as PTF, 'FH' as Assgnmt, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (TTY = '804' or substring(GL,1,5) in ('16100','24100','44100','68200')) and not TTY = '815' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-12-31' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy, TP, PC)
Update TransX set GL = '4430000', TTY = '', ProdCode = '', PTF = '', TransCode = '', Assgnmt = '4419900 to 6045' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4419900'
update TransX set GL = '2150000' , TTY = '607', Assgnmt = '1310004 to 2380', ProdCode = 'U1804' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2150001' and Assgnmt = '1310004 to 2383'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1570000','2170000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, '' as Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC,ProdCode,PTF)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1560001' as GL, Crcy, PC,'615' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1801' as ProdCode, Flex5, -Amt1, -Amt2 , -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600067')
update TransX set  TTY = '626' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TTY = '809' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('156','216')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, Crcy, PC,'803' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1801' as ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600052' and Assgnmt like '% 805')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, Crcy, PC,'603' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1801' as ProdCode, Flex5, -Amt1, -Amt2 , -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600052' and Assgnmt like '% 805')
update TransX set  TTY = '991' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '990' and not '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and GL = '2210000'

update TransX set  TTY = '806' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('803','805','808','811','812') and not '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('148','221','282') and Zone in ('1','2')
Update TransX set GL = '4398005', TTY = '991' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4398008'
Update TransX set TTY = '806' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1560002' and TTY in ('803','805')
update TransX set  TTY = '640' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('155','156','215','216')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '4398600' as GL, Crcy, '' as TTY, '' as TP, '5500000000' as PC, '' as ProdCode, '' as PTF, '' as Assgnmt, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Co,GL,GLdesc,TP,BusCat,Amt1) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Co,GL,GLdesc,TP,BusCat,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not substring(GL,1,3) in ('155','156','157','215','216','217') and not substring(GL,1,2) in ('46','56'))
update TransX set  Flex9 = (case when Co < '5990' then 'IFRS  4' else 'IFRS 17' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co < '5990'
update t set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update t set Flex2 = os.OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join (select OS_GL,min(OS_GL_Desc) as OS_GL_Desc from osAccountMap3 group by OS_GL) os on t.Flex1 = os.OS_GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update t set Flex4 = os.OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join (select OS_GL,min(OS_GL_Desc) as OS_GL_Desc from osAccountMap3 group by OS_GL) os on t.Flex3 = os.OS_GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set  TTY = '806' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '' and not '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('131') and Zone in ('1','2')

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.Descr and m.Field1 = '' and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr and m.Field1 = '' and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL and not GL in ('2853500','2851017')

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.Descr and t.BusCat = m.Field1 and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'607' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1804' as ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4600000' and Assgnmt like '% 805')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'600' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1804' as ProdCode, Flex5, -Amt1, -Amt2 , -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4600000' and Assgnmt like '% 805')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1560000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'626' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1806' as ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4610000' and Assgnmt like '% 805')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '1560000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'620' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1806' as ProdCode, Flex5, -Amt1, -Amt2 , -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4610000' and Assgnmt like '% 805')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Co, GL, TP, UWYR, AccYr, BusCat, Contract, TTY, PC, Amt1) (select KeyID, Yr, Co, substring(GL,1,3) + '00' + substring(GL,6,2), TP, UWYR, AccYr, BusCat, Contract, TTY, PC, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '824')
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'IFRS-17 other reload', SubProd = 'G26' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set  TTY = '991' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '' and not '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and GL in ('4397000','4397002')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, -Amt1,- Amt2 ,- Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set  BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'

update x set Flex1 = y.Descr, Flex3 = y.Field1 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'IC Validations' and y.Field2 = x.GL where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Flex1 is NULL and y.Field3 = '' and y.Field4 = ''

update x set Flex1 = y.Descr, Flex3 = y.Field1 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'IC Validations' and y.Field2 <= x.GL and y.Field3 >= x.GL and y.Field4 <= x.BusCat and y.Field5 >= x.BusCat where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Flex1 is NULL and y.Field5 <> ''

update x set Flex1 = y.Descr, Flex3 = y.Field1 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'IC Validations' and y.Field2 <= x.GL and y.Field3 >= x.GL where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Flex1 is NULL and y.Field5 = ''
update TransX set PTF = 'U3650' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4610000' and coalesce(ProdCode,'') = ''
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

Update t set GL = m.Field3, ProdCode = m.Field4, PTF = m.Field5, TransCode = m.Field6, Assgnmt = m.Descr + ' to ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'ODY TP' and t.GL = m.Descr and (BusCat = m.Field6 or m.Field6 = '') where t.KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data8') and not GL in ('4419900') and Assgnmt is NULL
update TransX set  BusCat = '20' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (BusCat like '2%' or BusCat = '10')
update TransX set Assgnmt = '' where KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data8') and substring('[version]',1,3) = 'Net'
[ReplaceConnString][LockDownConnString]
Delete from IR17_LIC_Singapore where YearPeriod like '[Yr]%' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_LIC_Singapore (Co,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,TP,PC_Desc,Program,YearPeriod,GL_Grp,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Portfolio_PC) Select Co,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,TP,PC_Desc,Program,YearPeriod,GL_Grp,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Portfolio_PC from IR17_LIC where YearPeriod like '[Yr]%' and Co in ('2004','2005')
Delete from IR17_CF_Singapore where YearPeriod like '[Yr]%' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_CF_Singapore (Co,YearPeriod,GL,DocNbr,RowNbr,Crcy,Co_Crcy,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt,TP,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode,TransID,AppliedToID,PaidByID,Group1,Group2,Group2_Desc,Group3,Group3_Desc,PC,PC_Desc,Program,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC) Select Co,YearPeriod,GL,DocNbr,RowNbr,Crcy,Co_Crcy,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt,TP,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode,TransID,AppliedToID,PaidByID,Group1,Group2,Group2_Desc,Group3,Group3_Desc,PC,PC_Desc,Program,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC from IR17_CF where YearPeriod like '[Yr]%' and Co in ('2004','2005')
Delete from IR17_Other_Singapore where YearPeriod like '[Yr]%' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_Other_Singapore (Co,Crcy,Co_Crcy,YearPeriod,GL,GL_Desc,PC,PC_Desc,Program,CC,CC_Desc,CCCat,CCCat_Desc,TP,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD) Select Co,Crcy,Co_Crcy,YearPeriod,GL,GL_Desc,PC,PC_Desc,Program,CC,CC_Desc,CCCat,CCCat_Desc,TP,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD from IR17_Other where YearPeriod like '[Yr]%' and Co in ('2004','2005')
Delete from IR17_Control_Singapore where YearPeriod like '[Yr]%' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_Control_Singapore (YearPeriod,Co,GL,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,PC_Desc,CC,CC_Desc,TP,ACD,Source,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD) Select YearPeriod,Co,GL,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,PC_Desc,CC,CC_Desc,TP,ACD,Source,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD from IR17_Control where YearPeriod like '[Yr]%' and Co in ('2004','2005')
[ReplaceConnString][OriginalConnString]

Update t set GL = m.Field3, ProdCode = m.Field4, PTF = m.Field5, TransCode = m.Field6, Assgnmt = m.Descr + ' to ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Other' and t.GL like m.Descr and (BusCat = m.Field6 or m.Field6 = '') where t.KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data8')
update TransX set PTF = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PTF is NULL
update TransX set ProdCode = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ProdCode is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, PTF, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, PTF, Assgnmt, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '1' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, PTF, Assgnmt, ProdCode)
update TransX set  BusCat = '30' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
update TransX set  BusCat = '30' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '' and (substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','15','23','24') or GL like '287%')
update TransX set  BusCat = '20' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = ''
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-data8' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and zone = '8'

Update t set GL = m.Field3, ProdCode = m.Field4, PTF = m.Field5, TransCode = m.Field6, Assgnmt = m.Descr + ' to ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'ODY TP' and t.GL like m.Descr and (BusCat = m.Field6 or m.Field6 = '') where t.KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data8') and not GL in ('4419900') and Assgnmt is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '4398600' as GL, Crcy, '' as TTY, '' as TP, '5500000000' as PC, '' as ProdCode, '' as PTF, '' as Assgnmt, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data8') group by KeyID, Co, Crcy)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data8') group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt)
Update t set Co = m.Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Co' and m.Descr = t.Co where t.KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data8')
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data8'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1,Flex3,Flex9,Co,GL,TP,BusCat,Amt1) values ('[batchID]-data2', '2381','1310','Adj','2022','1399998','F0000','20',543463.30)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Assgnmt, Crcy, TTY, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '5600052' as GL, '2880000 803' as Assgnmt, Crcy, '' as TTY, TP, '' as BusCat, PC, Flex5, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2880000')
